info.title: IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDose ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDoseVS
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDoseVS.

ValueSet-IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDos.title: IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDose ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDos.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: First Hib dose from the primary series was administered-279
First Hib dose from the primary series was administered to the client within 1 year of age. Client's age is less than 5 years-302
Second Hib dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed-99
Second Hib dose from the primary series was administered. Client's age is less than 5 years-167
One Hib booster dose was administered. Hib immunization schedule has been completed-120

ValueSet-IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDos.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDoseVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
